title: Duplicate Notifications
excerpt: I am fairly new to the tool and seem to have set up too many notifications and am looking to minimize these.  For example, on a vacation board, I am notified when the item is created - Awesome!  I am also notified if the…

posts.author: Tesa (T Stoodley)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am fairly new to the tool and seem to have set up too many notifications and am looking to minimize these. For example, on a vacation board, I am notified when the item is created - Awesome! I am also notified if the requestor changes those dates, Which happens on every new request, so that gives me a second notification when the item is being created… hmmm, hence starts the problem.

If the person requesting holidays enters the wrong date, and then corrects it, I get another notification.

I just want to reduce the notifications and hoping for some suggestions.

Thanks.

posts.author: leonidas (Leonidas)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! If it’s no trouble please copy the board (just the structure not the items of course) so I can check out some notifications and share the duplicate board with me. I have something in mind I want to check. I think you have just set up an redundant notification to be notified when the date column changes.
